title: Cannon Car Wash
name: cannon_car_wash
tag_line: Triggered rollers and spray, then a fully-contained 360 km/h launch
description: A BeamNG MCP-authored Gridmap V2 trap and rigid Props-category car wash with a detailed Blender visual, fixed infrastructure JBeam, grounded D-Series, twelve stock spray misters, trigger-controlled ambient rollers, fully-contained launch gate, 3-2-1-GO countdown, 100 m/s launch, and concrete impact wall.
author: beamng-mcp contributors
